title: Continuity History
description: Long-horizon record of product-definition hardening, profile architecture, continuity doctrine, and public-system preparation across Neuroartan.

entries.title: Product definition cluster finalized
entries.summary: The Neuroartan product-definition cluster was finalized as the routing source for public interaction, profile training, and continuity architecture.

entries.title: Profile setup and public identity specification hardened
entries.summary: Profile setup was defined as a convergent identity layer with username infrastructure, public-route logic, and eligibility boundaries.

entries.title: Voice-training doctrine normalized for runtime transition
entries.summary: Voice in ICOS was constrained as governed continuity rather than imitation, with profile linkage and selection boundaries clarified.

entries.title: Leadership surface direction established
entries.summary: Leadership was approved as a founder-first public trust surface with future multi-profile expansion handled through its own destination.

entries.title: Product history reconstruction consolidated
entries.summary: Historical reconstruction clarified the transition from founder-centered ecosystem logic toward a bounded cognitive product institution.
